security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; style-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*

bundle.shortDescription: Local AI image and video generation (in development).
bundle.longDescription: Darkroom is an early scaffold for a desktop app that will generate images and video with AI models running entirely on the user's own GPU. It does not generate anything yet — no engine and no models are wired up. See the repository for progress.
